instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations. The plan must include at least three games, with one being a team-based activity. The letter "S" must appear exactly 15 times throughout the response. The entire response must be written in English and include a relevant English idiom. Maintain a cheerful and positive tone throughout the response. The phrase "fun for everyone" must appear exactly twice. The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences. The keyword "fun" must not appear in the response.
response:
Start with a sunny setup that shines with stars and stripes.
Set up a space where smiles spread and stories start.
Such a spot makes sense for such a special day.

Play a game where teams share a sack of seeds.
See how fast they sort the seeds and share the seeds.
Such a task brings so much joy to all guests.

Serve sweet sweets like strawberries and slices of pie.
Such tasty treats make the whole room feel so nice.
See how everyone enjoys these special sweet treats.

Have a blast with games that bring so much fun.
Such a plan ensures such happiness for such a child.
Such a day is sure to be so very special.
